manga.title: Collapse & Rewind
manga.description:
Jonathan’s dream is to become a popular online streamer!   
Will failed real estate agent Sophie be able to help him achieve his dreams?

**Original Webtoon:**  
[Toomics](https://m.toomics.com/uplmscg/episode/toon/5211/), [Lezhin](https://www.lezhin.com/ko/comic/collapse_look_again)

**Official Translations:**
